title: KLives!
description: This mod adds pvp lives system made for minecraft smps.
body:
This mod is made for Minecraft SMPs.

If you're a server owner looking for a mod that adds a social aspect to your server, you've come to the right place!

KLives! is a mod that adds a lives system to PvP.

What does that mean? Let me break it down.

Upon joining a server with the mod installed, a player will have 5 lives. A player can only lose lives by being executed during a PvP fight — I'll explain that more later. Currently, there is no way to gain more lives.

To avoid players accidentally killing each other and wasting lives, there is a "down" system in place. After a player is "killed" by another player, the victim goes into a downed state where they can either:
A: Get revived by another player crouching and holding right-click
or
B: Get executed by the attacker after 5 seconds.

If neither happens, the downed player will die and lose a life after 30 seconds.

After a player loses all of their lives, they will enter a "ghost" state where they cannot interact with or attack anything. A player can be revived at an admin-spawned structure called the Revival Shrine at the cost of one of the reviver's lives.

**Current Commands**
- /lives  — Allows the user to see how many lives they currently have.
- /klives lives get <player> — Admin command that shows how many lives a specific player has.
- /klives lives set <player> <amount> — Admin command that sets a player’s lives to an exact number.
- /klives lives give <player> <amount> — Admin command that adds lives to a player.
- /klives lives take <player> <amount> — Admin command that removes lives from a player.
- /klives shrine spawn — Admin command that spawns a Revival Shrine at the admin’s current location.

For any feedback/suggestion contact me on discord @Lunalazy
